kb_knowledge.text:
Warranty Expiration Policy

Expiration Rules

All warranty claims must be submitted while the device warranty is in ACTIVE status. Claims submitted after the warranty expiration date are automatically denied regardless of the nature of the issue.

Decision: DENY (Expired Warranty)

If the warranty_expiration date has passed, the claim must be DENIED. No exceptions unless approved by a Medtric Global warranty manager through the escalation process.

Grace Period

There is NO grace period after warranty expiration. The expiration date is the final day of coverage.

Renewal Options

Customers with expired warranties may purchase an extended warranty within 30 days of expiration. Contact Medtric Sales for renewal pricing.
